observed_facts: The inbound event declared source schema version 2.
The qualification input contract accepted only source schema version 1.
Schema version 2 declared lead.estimated_monthly_budget, with an observed value of 6100.
The qualification contract required lead.monthly_budget, which was unresolved.
The unresolved monthly budget was defaulted to 0 with no alias applied.
The resulting CRM lead was assigned score 60, status needs_review, and route sales:intake_review despite the unresolved required source path.
The runtime lifecycle claim was succeeded.
primary_hypothesis: A source-schema evolution from lead.monthly_budget to lead.estimated_monthly_budget was not reflected in the versioned qualification mapping. The unresolved required value was silently defaulted to 0 instead of remaining unknown, allowing qualification to proceed with materially incorrect input. Confidence is high, although the evidence does not expose the qualification algorithm or prove the intended field migration.
alternative_hypotheses: The version-2 source schema may be invalid because it omitted a still-required lead.monthly_budget field rather than intentionally renaming it.
The qualification engine may independently mishandle unknown required values, even if the mapping contract is corrected.
The persisted qualification may have been computed from another unrecorded input, because no field-level qualification trace is present.
missing_evidence: The complete version-1 and version-2 source schema definitions and migration history.
The qualification input mapping implementation or declarative mapping for each accepted schema version.
A field-level qualification trace showing how monthly_budget affected the score, status, and route.
The policy defining whether schema-version mismatches must reject processing or preserve unresolved values as unknown.
The unredacted payload needed to confirm that no additional budget field was supplied.
recommended_next_investigation: Perform a read-only comparison of source schema versions 1 and 2 against the lead-qualification-input contract, then inspect the field-level mapping and qualification trace for FORM-LEAD-4001 to determine whether lead.estimated_monthly_budget should alias to monthly_budget and whether unresolved required values are prevented from entering qualification.
